description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines, situated on a rectangular plot with surrounding green lawn and paved driveways. The front facade features large glass windows, a prominent entryway with a wooden door, and a driveway leading to a covered carport. The rear of the house opens to a private backyard with a wooden deck and a rectangular swimming pool, enclosed by a white perimeter wall. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with accents of wood and glass, giving the house a sleek and contemporary appearance. The windows are arranged in broad horizontal bands, maximizing natural light and providing expansive views. The property is bordered by paved roads and sidewalks, integrating seamlessly into an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern, two-story white house with large glass windows, a flat roof, a carport, and a backyard pool, set on a landscaped urban lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large glass windows, driveway, and carport.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white wall, carport, and partial view of the backyard pool and deck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive glass windows, wooden deck, and swimming pool within the enclosed backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, carport, and the transition between the front and backyard areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows in horizontal bands
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide wooden door, minimal steps, and a covered carport adjacent to the entrance.
